Name: FSliderStyle
Description: Represents the appearance of an SSlider

Variables.Name: NormalBarImage
Variables.Description: Image to use when the slider bar is in its normal state

Variables.Name: DisabledBarImage
Variables.Description: Image to use when the slider bar is in its disabled state

Variables.Name: NormalThumbImage
Variables.Description: Image to use when the slider thumb is in its normal state

Variables.Name: DisabledThumbImage
Variables.Description: Image to use when the slider thumb is in its disabled state
